summary: CRITICAL: No pytest test files provided despite task explicitly requiring TDD—workflow line 23 runs `pytest tests/ -v` on non-existent directory. Unused pyyaml dependency (line 20). Hardcoded fixture path `fixtures/test_input.json` (line 26) lacks existence check; fails if run standalone. run_act_tests.py duplicates assertion logic (lines ~95–115: separate checks for exit code, 'Job succeeded', expected output). label_assigner.py itself is well-structured; run_act_tests.py is functional workaround but doesn't fulfill TDD requirement. Would not ship.
